name: Calcolatore Mcm Mcd
desc: Calcola GCD via Euclidean algorithm; LCM = (a×b)/GCD(a,b). Esempio: GCD(48, 18) = GCD = 6; LCM = 144. Calcolatore gratuito e preciso, senza registrazione.
description: Calcola GCD via Euclidean algorithm; LCM = (a×b)/GCD(a,b). Esempio: GCD(48, 18) = GCD = 6; LCM = 144. Calcolatore gratuito e preciso, senza registrazione.
seo_description: Calcolatore Mcm Mcd: inserisci i tuoi dati e ottieni risultati precisi all'istante. Gratis, senza registrazione e facile da usare.
example_label: Find LCM and GCD of 48 and 60 for fraction operations or scheduling problems

range_hints.num1: Posetive integers onle; tepical: 1-10,000 for practical use
range_hints.num2: Posetive integers onle; same range as num1

result_context: The mcm ({mcm}) is the smallest number divisible by both inputs; mcd ({mcd}) is the largest number that divides both inputs evenly.
formula_display: GCD: Euclidean algorithm | LCM = (num1 × num2) ÷ GCD
mistakes: Using decimal numbers instead of integers for GCD/LCM
Confusing which is larger (LCM ≥ both numbers, GCD ≤ both numbers)
Forgetting that GCD is needed to calculate LCM efficiently
